select_when: A team wants to add one more initiative even though the same people, budget, or launch window are needed by a higher-leverage move.
A default renewal, inherited project, or existing channel is being treated as free because the next-best use of the same resources has not been named.
Resources are scarce and each yes displaces a real alternative in capital, attention, headcount, or calendar time.
Trade-offs span more than money and the decision should price lost optionality, learning, morale, or trust rather than only explicit cash cost.
avoid_when: The option set is still poorly framed, so comparison would create false precision around the wrong alternatives or objective function.
The analysis is loading the comparison with unrealistic alternatives that are not genuinely available, fundable, or executable.

curation_notes.summary: Kept the curation focused on displaced alternatives, default continuation, and resource foreclosure rather than generic economics examples.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor breadth around lifestyle or philosophical trade-off examples because the strongest raw material is operational resource allocation.
Did not add Wave 4 source overlays; this batch only notes later candidacy in artifacts.
open_questions: The output label compresses multiple raw roles: comparison discipline, displacement pricing, and prioritization pressure.

select_when.note: The raw source is unusually explicit on scarce resources, default continuation, and displaced alternatives; review mainly tightened those into routing triggers.

avoid_when.note: Both anti-activation conditions come directly from explicit danger and anti-pattern language in the raw file.

input_type.note: The source clearly applies to constrained allocation choices, but the typed input label is still reviewed normalization.

output_type.note: The raw model prices what a yes prevents elsewhere; the output label compresses that function into a reusable operational artifact.

reasoning_types.note: Opportunity cost is strongly counterfactual and diagnostic in use, but the taxonomy names are reviewed normalization.
